title: Foreign Affairs Manual section on Referrals for Refugee Status updated to remove references to transgender and intersex individuals
description_html:
DOS updated 9 Foreign Affairs Manual 203.4-2(b) to remove references to transgender and intersex individuals in its examples of people a U.S. embassy may refer for refugee-status consideration. The change also replaces references to "gender" with "sex."

Trump 2.0 [ID: #1608]
